headline: Equifax’s AI Savings, Buybacks and Mexico Deal Could Be A Game Changer For Equifax (EFX)
summary: Equifax recently reported its second-quarter 2026 results, with revenue rising to US$1,700.1 million while net income eased slightly year-on-year, and issued third-quarter guidance calling for US$1.68 billion to US$1.71 billion of revenue and earnings of US$2.15 to US$2.25 per share. Alongside these results, Equifax completed a US$1.49 billion share repurchase program and outlined an expanded AI-driven cost reduction plan and a US$750 million acquisition in Mexico, underscoring how it is...
